nodes.title: Welcome to Summit Physical Therapy
nodes.heroTitle: Move Better. Feel Better. Live Better.

heroDescription.processed: Expert, hands-on physical therapy to help you recover from injury, manage pain, and return to the activities you love. Our licensed therapists create individualized treatment plans using evidence-based techniques in a supportive, encouraging environment.
heroDescription.summary: Expert, hands-on physical therapy to help you recover from injury, manage pain, and return to the activities you love. Our licensed therapists create individualized treatment plans using evidence-base

heroImage.alt: Physical therapist guiding a patient through rehabilitation exercises

ctaDescription.processed: Don't let pain or injury hold you back. Most patients can be seen within 24-48 hours of calling. In many states, you can start physical therapy without a doctor's referral through direct access. Contact us to learn more.
